name: chat2buy-whatsapp-autopilot
description: Track 4 Autopilot Agent for the Qwen Cloud Hackathon: a WhatsApp sales operator for small businesses.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix whatsapp-autopilot install && npm --prefix app install
scripts.build:dashboard: npm --prefix app run build && node scripts/copy-dashboard.mjs
scripts.check: node --check whatsapp-autopilot/server.js && node --check whatsapp-autopilot/routes/webhook.js && node --check whatsapp-autopilot/lib/ai.js && npm --prefix app run build
